hero_desc: I build and operate financial and educational technology companies. I connect HNWIs and corporations with the payment infrastructure they need.
about_p1: I'm Kevin A. Barquero. Founder and operator of financial and educational technology companies with operations in Costa Rica, Panama, and the United States. Through KB-Consulting I connect HNWIs and corporations with payment infrastructure and digital asset solutions. Through BBR Tek and Bellndesk I build educational platforms for institutions and creators.
about_p2: My approach is simple: identify real problems in payments and education, build solutions that work, and connect the right people with the right infrastructure. I don't manage capital. I don't give financial advice. I build and operate.
consulting_subtitle: Solutions we operate. No theory — real infrastructure.
service1_desc: Connection with stablecoin solutions, USD on/off ramps, and access to international banking for corporations and high-net-worth clients.
service2_desc: Advisory on entity structuring in CR, PA, and US for access to financial infrastructure without requiring local presence.
service3_desc: Custom design and development of educational platforms (web, iOS, Android) for institutions and corporations.
service4_desc: White-label solution for creators, academies, and institutions looking to launch their own online education experience.
service5_desc: Automation software for TradingView strategies. Independent tools that each user operates on their own.
service6_desc: Advisory on business model, go-to-market, and scalability for companies in FinTech and EdTech.
portfolio_subtitle: Companies I build and operate in FinTech and EdTech.
contact_subtitle: Do you need payment infrastructure, an educational platform, or strategic advisory in FinTech/EdTech? Let's talk.
contact_form_subtitle: Tell me about your project and I'll get back to you within 24h.
